title: loxogramme malayana
intro: Loxogramme malayana, also known as the Malay Loxogramme fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Loxogramme malayana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Loxogramme malayana include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are typically made from the plant's leaves and stems.
